case_title: ADAM HEITMAN VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEITMAN, ADAM ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS TRIAL IS HELD ON SEP-13-2023 - EVIDENCE IS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND THE MATTER HAVING BEEN TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSSION A JUDGMENT IS NOW ENTERED. JUDGE CURTIS E.A. KARNOW, CLERK DANIAL LEMIRE, NOT REPORTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED JUN-30-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DEANNA SKAGGS, PARALEGAL FOR CCSF. FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER CONTINUED DEFENDANT WILL NOT ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2023 BY CURTIS KARNOW. CLERK DANIAL LEMIRE, NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEITMAN, ADAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HEITMAN, ADAM AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEITMAN, ADAM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-16-2023 - CONTINUED DEFENDANT WILL NOT ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM TO SEP-13-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ADAM HEITMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DEANNA SKAGGS (PARALEGAL). ** DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. ** NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO DEFENDANT NOT STIPULATING TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM TO SEP-13-2023 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 611. PLAINTIFF ADAM HEITMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DEANNA SKAGGS (PARALEGAL FOR CCSF) WITH WITNESS ERIC GUAJARDO. ***DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO THIS MATTER BEING HEARD BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM.*** PARTIES ARE INSTRUCTED TO REPORT TO DEPT. 611/JUDGE KARNOW TODAY AT 2:00 P.M. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
